title: rubus pulvereus
intro: Rubus pulvereus, also known as the Dusty Raspberry, is a type of flowering plant native to the eastern parts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rubus pulvereus include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes, reduce swelling, and promote overall skin health. Rubus pulvereus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
